title: deschampsia cespitosa subsp. septentrionalis
intro: Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. septentrionalis, also known as Northern Hair Grass or Red Grass, is a subspecies of the Deschampsia cespitosa plant, a type of perennial grass that is native to the northern regions of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. septentrionalis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a useful remedy for skin irritations and infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
